pageTitle.zh: 你的 1320 灵魂本源编码

pageSubtitle.en: A four-part soul blueprint for awareness, reflection, and conscious integration.
pageSubtitle.zh: 四段式灵魂蓝图，用于觉察、反思与有意识整合。

boundaryNote.en: This is a first-layer reflection. Your code is a mirror, not fixed destiny.
boundaryNote.zh: 这是第一层反思。你的编码是一面镜子，而非固定的命运。

integratedLead.en: Your four codes weave into one mirror — for awareness, reflection, and conscious integration.
integratedLead.zh: 你的四段编码织成一面镜子——用于觉察、反思与有意识整合。

missingEntryFallback.en: This section is being prepared for the full report. Your current code still offers a meaningful first-layer reflection.
missingEntryFallback.zh: 此部分正在完整报告中完善。你当前的编码仍可提供有意义的第一层反思。

lockedTeaserLabel.en: Available in the Full Soul Origin Report
lockedTeaserLabel.zh: 完整灵魂本源报告中提供
